narrative:
Precinct Rock Creek Village (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 432 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
